headline: Cognex (CGNX) Down 1.9% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Cognex (CGNX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Guidewire Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
summary: GWRE tops fiscal Q3 estimates as revenues rise 26.9% and ARR grows 19%, prompting higher full-year revenue, profit and cash flow outlooks.
